title: Traveler's Titles Gate 3
description: A simple sound resource pack to add Baldur's Gate 3 sound effects for Yung's Traveler's Titles mod.
body:
A simple sound resource pack to add Baldur's Gate 3 sound effects for Yung's Traveler's Titles mod.

You will need the [Traveler's Title's](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelers-titles) mod to hear the sounds in game.

Yes, you have my permission to use this in your own modpacks.
